heading: Authorization
label: 4854b Authorization
text: Of the total amount approved in appropriation Acts under section 4852() of this title, there shall be set aside to carry out this part $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1993, and $5,000,000 for fiscal year 1994.o1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSection 4852() of this title, referred to in text, was redesignated by , , .osection 4852(p) of this titlePub. L. 103–233, title III, § 305(a)(1)108 Stat. 370Apr. 11, 1994
